content.query:
CREATE VIEW     v_SCO_OW_Cost
AS

-- drop view v_SCO_OW_Cost

SELECT			X.*, Y.CostValue as [Cost WBM]
FROM
(
SELECT			A.Division, A.Company, [Customer ID], [Customer Name], [Customer PO], [Order ID], A.Date
,				A.Brand, [Product Category], A.[Part ID], [Part Description], [Supplier ID], MAX([Sales Amt]) as [Sales Amt]
,				MAX([Sales Qty]) as [Sales Qty], MAX(CostValue) as [Cost], MAX(B.Date) as IntercoDate_WBM
FROM
(
SELECT			DISTINCT DF.Division as Division
,				DF.Company as Company
,				AC.Customer as [Customer ID]
,				AC.Name as [Customer Name]
,				ATD.CustomerPoNumber as [Customer PO]
,				ATD.SalesOrder as [Order ID]
,				ATD.InvoiceDate as [Date]
,				DF.Brand
,				DF.Category as [Product Category]
,				ATD.StockCode as [Part ID]
,				IM.Description as [Part Description]
,				Supplier as [Supplier ID]
,				NetSalesValue as [Sales Amt]
,				QtyInvoiced as [Sales Qty]
,				CostValue/NULLIF(QtyInvoiced,0) as [Cost O]
FROM			SCO.ArTrnSummary ATS
JOIN			SCO.ArTrnDetail ATD on ATS.Invoice = ATD.Invoice
JOIN			SCO.ArCustomer AC on ATS.Customer = AC.Customer
JOIN			SCO.InvMaster IM on ATD.StockCode = IM.StockCode
JOIN			SCA.Division_Family DF on ATD.ProductClass = DF.ProductClass
WHERE			ATD.InvoiceDate >= '2019-01-01'
AND				AC.UserField1 NOT IN ('GWT', 'INTERCOMPANY', 'INTERCOMPA')
AND				AC.Customer <> 'ASB001'
AND				DF.Company = 'O'
AND             NetSalesValue > 0
AND				DF.Brand IN ('YONANAS', 'WESTBEND', 'VINTURI')
) A

LEFT JOIN

(
SELECT			'O' as Company
,				'Countertop' as Division
,				P.ID collate database_default as [Part ID]
,				MAX(COL.LAST_SHIPPED_DATE) as [Date]
,				MAX((UNIT_MATERIAL_COST + UNIT_LABOR_COST + UNIT_BURDEN_COST + UNIT_SERVICE_COST)) as CostValue
FROM			WBM.CUSTOMER_ORDER CO
JOIN			WBM.CUST_ORDER_LINE COL on CO.ID = COL.CUST_ORDER_ID
JOIN			WBM.PART P on COL.PART_ID = P.ID
JOIN			WBM.PART_SITE PS on P.ID = PS.PART_ID
WHERE			P.USER_1 IN ('WESTBEND') AND PS.SITE_ID = '20'
AND				CO.CUSTOMER_ID IN ('E555005', 'E555024', 'E555035', 'E555585', 'V555005',
										'Y555005', 'Y555024', 'Y555034', 'Y555585')
GROUP BY		FORMAT(COL.LAST_SHIPPED_DATE, 'yyyy-MM'), P.ID

UNION ALL

SELECT			'O' as Company
,				'Countertop' as Division
,				P.ID collate database_default as [Part ID]
,				MAX(COL.LAST_SHIPPED_DATE) as [Date]
,				MAX((UNIT_MATERIAL_COST + UNIT_LABOR_COST + UNIT_BURDEN_COST + UNIT_SERVICE_COST)) as CostValue
FROM			WBM.CUSTOMER_ORDER CO
JOIN			WBM.CUST_ORDER_LINE COL on CO.ID = COL.CUST_ORDER_ID
JOIN			WBM.PART P on COL.PART_ID = P.ID
JOIN			WBM.PART_SITE PS on P.ID = PS.PART_ID
WHERE			P.USER_1 IN ('VINTURI') AND PS.SITE_ID = '30'
AND				CO.CUSTOMER_ID IN ('E555005', 'E555024', 'E555035', 'E555585', 'V555005',
										'Y555005', 'Y555024', 'Y555034', 'Y555585')
GROUP BY		FORMAT(COL.LAST_SHIPPED_DATE, 'yyyy-MM'), P.ID

UNION ALL

SELECT			'O' as Company
,				'Countertop' as Division
,				P.ID collate database_default as [Part ID]
,				MAX(COL.LAST_SHIPPED_DATE) as [Date]
,				MAX((UNIT_MATERIAL_COST + UNIT_LABOR_COST + UNIT_BURDEN_COST + UNIT_SERVICE_COST)) as CostValue
FROM			WBM.CUSTOMER_ORDER CO
JOIN			WBM.CUST_ORDER_LINE COL on CO.ID = COL.CUST_ORDER_ID
JOIN			WBM.PART P on COL.PART_ID = P.ID
JOIN			WBM.PART_SITE PS on P.ID = PS.PART_ID
WHERE			P.USER_1 IN ('YONANAS') AND PS.SITE_ID = '40'
AND				CO.CUSTOMER_ID IN ('E555005', 'E555024', 'E555035', 'E555585', 'V555005',
										'Y555005', 'Y555024', 'Y555034', 'Y555585')
GROUP BY		FORMAT(COL.LAST_SHIPPED_DATE, 'yyyy-MM'), P.ID
) B				on A.Company = B.Company and A.Division = B.Division and A.[Part ID] = B.[Part ID]
WHERE			Brand IN ('YONANAS', 'WESTBEND', 'VINTURI')
AND				B.Date <= A.Date
GROUP BY		A.Division, A.Company, [Customer ID], [Customer Name], [Customer PO], [Order ID], A.Date
,				A.Brand, [Product Category], A.[Part ID], [Part Description], [Supplier ID]
) X

JOIN

(
SELECT			'O' as Company
,				'Countertop' as Division
,				P.ID collate database_default as [Part ID]
,				MAX(COL.LAST_SHIPPED_DATE) as [Date]
,				MAX((UNIT_MATERIAL_COST + UNIT_LABOR_COST + UNIT_BURDEN_COST + UNIT_SERVICE_COST)) as CostValue
FROM			WBM.CUSTOMER_ORDER CO
JOIN			WBM.CUST_ORDER_LINE COL on CO.ID = COL.CUST_ORDER_ID
JOIN			WBM.PART P on COL.PART_ID = P.ID
JOIN			WBM.PART_SITE PS on P.ID = PS.PART_ID
WHERE			P.USER_1 IN ('WESTBEND') AND PS.SITE_ID = '20'
AND				CO.CUSTOMER_ID IN ('E555005', 'E555024', 'E555035', 'E555585', 'V555005',
										'Y555005', 'Y555024', 'Y555034', 'Y555585')
GROUP BY		FORMAT(COL.LAST_SHIPPED_DATE, 'yyyy-MM'), P.ID

UNION ALL

SELECT			'O' as Company
,				'Countertop' as Division
,				P.ID collate database_default as [Part ID]
,				MAX(COL.LAST_SHIPPED_DATE) as [Date]
,				MAX((UNIT_MATERIAL_COST + UNIT_LABOR_COST + UNIT_BURDEN_COST + UNIT_SERVICE_COST)) as CostValue
FROM			WBM.CUSTOMER_ORDER CO
JOIN			WBM.CUST_ORDER_LINE COL on CO.ID = COL.CUST_ORDER_ID
JOIN			WBM.PART P on COL.PART_ID = P.ID
JOIN			WBM.PART_SITE PS on P.ID = PS.PART_ID
WHERE			P.USER_1 IN ('VINTURI') AND PS.SITE_ID = '30'
AND				CO.CUSTOMER_ID IN ('E555005', 'E555024', 'E555035', 'E555585', 'V555005',
										'Y555005', 'Y555024', 'Y555034', 'Y555585')
GROUP BY		FORMAT(COL.LAST_SHIPPED_DATE, 'yyyy-MM'), P.ID

UNION ALL

SELECT			'O' as Company
,				'Countertop' as Division
,				P.ID collate database_default as [Part ID]
,				MAX(COL.LAST_SHIPPED_DATE) as [Date]
,				MAX((UNIT_MATERIAL_COST + UNIT_LABOR_COST + UNIT_BURDEN_COST + UNIT_SERVICE_COST)) as CostValue
FROM			WBM.CUSTOMER_ORDER CO
JOIN			WBM.CUST_ORDER_LINE COL on CO.ID = COL.CUST_ORDER_ID
JOIN			WBM.PART P on COL.PART_ID = P.ID
JOIN			WBM.PART_SITE PS on P.ID = PS.PART_ID
WHERE			P.USER_1 IN ('YONANAS') AND PS.SITE_ID = '40'
AND				CO.CUSTOMER_ID IN ('E555005', 'E555024', 'E555035', 'E555585', 'V555005',
										'Y555005', 'Y555024', 'Y555034', 'Y555585')
GROUP BY		FORMAT(COL.LAST_SHIPPED_DATE, 'yyyy-MM'), P.ID
) Y				on X.Company = Y.Company and X.Division = Y.Division and X.[Part ID] = Y.[Part ID] and X.IntercoDate_WBM = Y.Date
